text: can install development version PEcAn.data.emulator r-universe like : can install directly GitHub remotes package like :
code: # Enable repository from pecanproject options(repos = c(   pecanproject = 'https://pecanproject.r-universe.dev',   CRAN = 'https://cloud.r-project.org')) # Download and install PEcAn.data.emulator in R install.packages('PEcAn.data.emulator') library(remotes) install_github('pecanproject/pecan',  subdir = "modules/data.emulator")

title: GaussProcess — GaussProcess

title: GaussProcess — GaussProcess
code: GaussProcess(   x,   y,   isotropic = TRUE,   nugget = TRUE,   method = "bayes",   ngibbs = 5000,   burnin = 1000,   thin = 1,   jump.ic = c(1.1, 0.2),   prior = "IG",   mix = "joint",   psi = NULL,   zeroMean = FALSE,   exclude = NULL,   ... )

title: GaussProcess — GaussProcess
text: x set independent variables y dependent variable isotropic Boolean indicating whether GP fit isotropically. FALSE, distances calculated deparately direction nugget allows additional error Y rather fix interpolation go points method method calculating correlations ngibbs number MCMC iterations (per chain) run burnin Number samples discard burnin (auto must FALSE) thin thinning matrix make things faster. Default thin 1 jump.ic initial condition jump standard deviation. prior 'unif', 'IG' mix joint=mix psi simultanously, =mix psi individually psi spatial corr zeroMean True mean 0, else false exclude <- used anywhere, dropped ... Additional arguments

title: GaussProcess — GaussProcess
text: Michael Dietze

text: Functions bounded, calculate.prior, ddist, get_ss, get_y, gepeval, .accepted, mcmc.GP, minimize.GP moved package PEcAn.assim.batch correct circular dependency.

text: Function plot.mvjump, moved PEcAn.assim.batch.
